accountSharing.blocked: Multiple people are using Dotabod GSI files for this stream. Account "{{accountName}}" is blocked. Use !clearsharing to reset, but ensure only one person has the GSI file.

aghs: Cetro de Aghanim de {{- heroName}}: {{- title}} · {{- description}}
betaTester_off: {{channel}} não é mais um beta tester. Digite !beta para entrar novamente
betaTester_on: {{channel}} agora é um beta tester. Visite discord.dotabod.com para ver os recursos beta. Digite !beta para desfazer

bets.cannotResolveCurrentMatch: Cannot resolve the current ongoing match. Wait for the game to end or use !won / !lost without a match ID for pending resolutions.
bets.lost: Nós perdemos, GG, boa tentativa! {{emote}} Vamos para o próximo.
bets.manualResolution: Disconnected before the match ended. {{- details}} Mods, use !won or !lost to resolve the bet manually and count the WL {{emote}}
bets.manualResolutionExpired: Previous match bet expired and was refunded (mods not doing their jobs, next time use !won or !lost) {{emote}}
bets.manualResolutionSuccess_lost: Match {{matchId}} manually resolved as LOST by @{{username}}
bets.manualResolutionSuccess_won: Match {{matchId}} manually resolved as WON by @{{username}}
bets.noRecentMatches: No resolved matches in this stream yet {{emote}}
bets.notScored: Partida não contabilizada {{emote}} Não adicionando nem subtraindo MMR para a partida {{matchId}}
bets.remade: Herói trocado {{emote}} Apostas para {{- oldHeroName}} reembolsadas, novas apostas abertas para {{- newHeroName}} {{emote2}}
bets.retroactiveAlreadyMatches_lost: Match {{matchId}} is already marked as LOST {{emote}}
bets.retroactiveAlreadyMatches_won: Match {{matchId}} is already marked as WON {{emote}}
bets.retroactiveCorrection_lost: Match {{matchId}} corrected from WON to LOST by @{{username}}
bets.retroactiveCorrection_won: Match {{matchId}} corrected from LOST to WON by @{{username}}
bets.retroactiveMatchExpired: Match {{matchId}} is too old to resolve (must be from current stream) {{emote}}
bets.retroactiveMatchNotFound: Match {{matchId}} not found in current stream {{emote}}
bets.retroactiveResolutionSuccess_lost: Match {{matchId}} manually marked as LOST by @{{username}}
bets.retroactiveResolutionSuccess_won: Match {{matchId}} manually marked as WON by @{{username}}
bets.unresolvedMatches_one: {{count}} unresolved match {{emote}} Use !won or !lost with match ID: {{- matchList}}
bets.unresolvedMatches_other: {{count}} unresolved matches {{emote}} Use !won or !lost with match ID: {{- matchList}}
bets.unresolvedReminder_one: Reminder: {{count}} match still needs resolving {{emote}} Use !won or !lost with match ID: {{- matchList}}
bets.unresolvedReminder_other: Reminder: {{count}} matches still need resolving {{emote}} Use !won or !lost with match ID: {{- matchList}}
bets.won: Nós ganhamos! {{emote}} Vamos para a próxima partida.

bounties.pickup: +$t(bounties.totalGold, {"count": {{bountyValue}} }) de ouro de bônus de recompensa ({{totalBounties}} /4) {{emote}} Obrigado {{heroNames}} {{emote2}}

chatters.smokeActivatedUnknown: {{emote}} An ally activated Smoke of Deceit!
chatters.tpFound: {{channel}} bom trabalho comprando um tp FINALMENTE depois de $t(seconds, {"count": {{seconds}} }) {{emote}}
chatters.tpFromDeath: Graças a essa morte você finalmente conseguiu um tp. Levou apenas $t(seconds, {"count": {{seconds}} }) {{emote}}

chattersRankUnknown: O rank de @{{username}} é desconhecido. Se torne um usuário verificado do Dotabod para obter seu rank! {{- url}}

clearsharing.error: Failed to clear account sharing. Please try again or contact support.
clearsharing.success: Account sharing reset successfully. Multiple Steam accounts can now send GSI data again. WARNING: Make sure only one person has the Dotabod GSI config file, or conflicts will reoccur.

clippingDisabled: the streamer turned off auto-clipping, which Dotabod needs to read live game data in 8500+ MMR games

privateProfile: O perfil do streamer é privado. O comando {{command}} usa dados do OpenDota e exige que a opção "Expor dados de partidas públicas" esteja habilitada nas configurações do Dota.
ranked_no: Não, este jogo não é ranqueado
rankOnlyDisabled: Modo verificado agora está desativado. Todos podem conversar.
rankOnlyEnabled: Modo verificado está ativado no momento. Apenas ranks {{rank}} ou acima podem conversar. Visite {{- url}} para tornar-se Dotabod verificado.
rankOnlyMode: @{{name}} - Sua mensagem foi excluída porque este canal está em modo verificado ({{requiredRank}}+ apenas). Visite {{- url}} para tornar-se um Dotabod verificado.
rankOnlyStatus_disabled: Modo verificado está desativado no momento.
rankOnlyStatus_enabled: Modo verificado está ativado no momento. Apenas ranks {{rank}} ou acima podem conversar. Visite {{- url}} para tornar-se Dotabod verificado.
refreshToken: Sua conta da Twitch precisa ser reconectada ao Dotabod. {{channel}} Deslogue-se e logue novamente em dotabod.com para corrigir isso.
